_comment: Pre-existing occurrences of the shared_ptr temporary UAF anti-pattern detected by check_be_shared_ptr_temporaries.py. See https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks/pull/71843. This list must only shrink.

violations.reviewed_safe_reason: Intrusive-ptr CoW idiom: the enclosing MutablePtr(raw) constructor increments the intrusive refcount before the source temporary returned by Base::try_mutate() is destroyed at the end of the full-expression, so the pointee stays alive.
Known bug; fix is in flight via https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks/pull/71843. Remove this entry once that PR merges.
